headline: How The Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Split On Growth And Execution
summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings has seen only a modest tweak to its fair value estimate, shifting from US$102.65 to US$103.00, which keeps the core valuation story largely intact. That kind of incremental change lines up with mixed Street commentary, where some analysts are nudging targets higher while others are cutting or stepping back on concerns around growth consistency and execution. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving narrative and what to watch if you are...
